place: Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: 6-Bedroom Beachfront Villa in Chaweng
note: Fully staffed · breakfast, welcome dinner & airport transfers included
blurb: A hillside villa that gazes gently down to a secluded Chaweng beach, descending three levels to a 22-metre infinity pool, a beach-level suite with its own jacuzzi and direct access to the sand. Six bedrooms plus a children’s dorm, gym and spa sala, fully staffed with a private chef.
detail:
Tucked into a green hillside above a secluded stretch of Chaweng sand, this six-bedroom villa steps down three levels from the road to the beach, opening to sea and island views from nearly every room — a calm, private escape only a short drive from the island’s restaurants and marinas.

At its heart is a 22-metre infinity pool with steps to a poolside sala, ponds and a sweep of outdoor living and dining that flows to the kitchen. The beach level is its own retreat: a king suite with a reading sala, a large jacuzzi, panorama, swim and beach decks, and direct access to the sand.

The bedrooms are generous and en-suite — kings with indoor and outdoor showers, the largest with an outdoor bathtub and a wide balcony — alongside a children’s dorm with twin beds. A fully-equipped gym and a massage sala round out the wellness offering, with a games and play deck for younger guests.

The villa is fully staffed with a manager, private chef, housekeepers, gardeners, a pool attendant and security, and a daily breakfast, a welcome lunch or dinner with wine, spa vouchers, a farewell beachfront movie night and airport transfers are all included.

features.l: 22 m infinity pool to the sea
Sea & island views from every room
